abilities.name: Ranger's Focus
abilities.description: Consume Focus to fire a flurry of arrows.

abilities.name: Enchanted Crystal Arrow
abilities.description: Fire a global arrow that stuns the first champion hit.

abilities.name: Orb of Deception
abilities.description: Send and return an orb, dealing magic then true damage.

abilities.name: Noxian Guillotine
abilities.description: Execute an enemy champion, dealing true damage that scales with bleed stacks.

abilities.name: Deathbringer Stance
abilities.description: Periodically, Aatrox's next basic attack gains 50 bonus range and deals bonus physical damage equal to 4% - 13% (based on level) of the target's maximum health, capped at 50 against monsters.

abilities.name: The Darkin Blade
abilities.description: Aatrox strikes with his blade in the target direction, dealing physical damage to enemies hit.

abilities.name: Infernal Chains
abilities.description: Aatrox sends a chain in the target direction that deals physical damage to the first enemy hit, doubled against minions, and slowing them by 25% for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Umbral Dash
abilities.description: Aatrox dashes in the target direction.

abilities.name: World Ender
abilities.description: Aatrox unleashes his true form for 10 seconds, fearing nearby enemy minions and monsters for 3 seconds, during which they are gradually slowed by up to 99% over the duration.

abilities.name: Assassin's Mark
abilities.description: Akali's damaging abilities against a champion create a ring around them for 4 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits.

abilities.name: Five Point Strike
abilities.description: Akali fans out kunais in a cone in the target direction, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.

abilities.name: Twilight Shroud
abilities.description: Akali restores 100 energy and detonates a smoke bomb a fixed distance away in the target direction, creating a circular shroud that expands over the next 5 seconds into a ring.

abilities.name: Shuriken Flip
abilities.description: Akali flips backward and, after the cast time, throws a shuriken in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first enemy hit.

abilities.name: Perfect Execution
abilities.description: Akali dashes a set distance in the direction of the target enemy champion, dealing magic damage to enemies she passes through.

abilities.name: Dirty Fighting
abilities.description: Akshan's basic attack fires an additional shot after a delay that deals (50% / 100%) ADphysical damage.

abilities.name: Avengerang
abilities.description: Akshan throws a boomerang in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies hit, revealing them for 1 second and extending its range each time it hits a target.

abilities.name: Going Rogue
abilities.description: Akshan enters camouflage, which lasts indefinitely while he is near terrain or inside brush, and for 1.75 seconds otherwise.

abilities.name: Heroic Swing
abilities.description: Akshan can activate _Heroic Swing_ three times before the ability goes on cooldown, and can use the third cast only after 0.5 seconds of the second cast.

abilities.name: Comeuppance
abilities.description: Akshan locks onto the target enemy champion and begins channeling for 3 seconds, revealing them as well as himself.

abilities.name: Triumphant Roar
abilities.description: Periodically while Alistar or nearby allied champions are wounded, he heals himself for 27 - 160 (based on level) and nearby allied champions for 54 - 320 (based on level).

abilities.name: Pulverize
abilities.description: Alistar smashes the ground, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies and stunning and knocking them up simultaneously for 1 second.

abilities.name: Headbutt
abilities.description: Alistar dashes to the target enemy's location.

abilities.name: Trample
abilities.description: Alistar tramples the ground for 5 seconds, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies every 0.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Unbreakable Will
abilities.description: Alistar cleanses himself of all crowd control and gains incoming damage reduction for 7 seconds.

abilities.name: Cursed Touch
abilities.description: Amumu's basic attacks and _Curse of the Sad Mummy_ are empowered to mark enemies with _Curse_ for 3 seconds, refreshing on subsequent applications and _Despair's_ per-tick damage.

abilities.name: Bandage Toss
abilities.description: Amumu throws a bandage in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first enemy hit, stunning them for 1 second and pulling him to them, during which they are revealed.

abilities.name: Despair
abilities.description: Amumu cries a continuous pool of tears, dealing magic damage every 0.5 seconds to nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Tantrum
abilities.description: Amumu releases his anger, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies and slowing them by 10% for 0.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Curse of the Sad Mummy
abilities.description: Amumu entangles nearby enemies in bandages, dealing magic damage as well as knocking down and stunning them for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Spirit Abjuration
abilities.description: Aurora's damaging basic attacks and abilities apply a stack of _Spirit Abjuration_ to enemies for 4 seconds, refreshing on subsequent applications and stacking up to 3 times.

abilities.name: Twofold Hex
abilities.description: Aurora fires a bolt of energy in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and marks them with a curse for 3.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Across the Veil
abilities.description: Aurora hops in the target direction inside a portal to the Spirit Realm.

abilities.name: The Weirding
abilities.description: Aurora blasts energy in a line in the target direction and recoils in the opposite direction.

abilities.name: Between Worlds
abilities.description: Aurora leaps in the target direction with displacement immunity over 0.4 seconds.

abilities.name: Mana Barrier
abilities.description: Periodically, when damaged to 35% maximum health, Blitzcrank first generates a shield equal to 30% of maximum mana, lasting for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Rocket Grab
abilities.description: Blitzcrank fires their right hand in the target direction that catches the first enemy hit, dealing magic damage, stunning for 0.65 seconds, and pulling them towards Blitzcrank, during which they are revealed.

abilities.name: Overdrive
abilities.description: Blitzcrank gains bonus movement speed for 2.5 seconds, decaying to 10% over 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Power Fist
abilities.description: Blitzcrank empowers their next basic attack within 5 seconds to have an uncancellable windup, gain 50 bonus attack range and critically strike, knocking up the target for 1 second.

abilities.name: Static Field
abilities.description: Blitzcrank detonates a static field that deals magic damage and silences nearby enemies for 0.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Blaze
abilities.description: Brand's abilities apply a stack of _Ablaze_ to enemies hit for 4 seconds, stacking up to 3 times and refreshing the duration of all stacks with each application.

abilities.name: Sear
abilities.description: Brand launches a fireball in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first enemy hit.

abilities.name: Pillar of Flame
abilities.description: After a 0.5 second delay, Brand erupts a pillar of flame at the target location that deals magic damage to enemies hit.

abilities.name: Conflagration
abilities.description: Brand ignites the target enemy, creating a blast that deals magic damage to them and causes the flame to spread from the target to nearby enemies and deal the same damage.

abilities.name: Pyroclasm
abilities.description: Brand launches a fireball at the target enemy that bounces between nearby enemies and Brand up to four times, dealing magic damage to enemies each time.

abilities.name: Concussive Blows
abilities.description: Braum's basic attacks and _Winter's Bite_ each inflict a stack to their target for 4 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits and stacking up to 4 times.

abilities.name: Winter's Bite
abilities.description: Braum throws ice in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first enemy hit and slows them by 70% decaying over 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Stand Behind Me
abilities.description: Braum dashes to the target ally, and upon arrival they both gain bonus armor and bonus magic resist for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Unbreakable
abilities.description: Braum sets his shield in the target direction for a duration, raising a barrier in front of him that intercepts all incoming hostile projectiles and reduces the damage Braum takes through it.

abilities.name: Glacial Fissure
abilities.description: Braum leaps into the air and slams down his shield, creating a fissure from the impact that travels forth in the target direction, dealing magic damage to enemies hit as well as those around Braum.

abilities.name: Headshot
abilities.description: Caitlyn's basic attacks generate a stack on-attack, doubled if she is within brush.

abilities.name: Piltover Peacemaker
abilities.description: Caitlyn fires a shot in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies hit.

abilities.name: Yordle Snap Trap
abilities.description: Caitlyn sets a trap at the target location that remains for 30 seconds.

abilities.name: 90 Caliber Net
abilities.description: Caitlyn fires a net in the target direction and recoils 390 units backwards.

abilities.name: Ace in the Hole
abilities.description: Caitlyn locks onto the target enemy champion and channels for 1.5 seconds, revealing them both.

abilities.name: Hextech Munitions
abilities.description: Corki's basic attacks and spellblade deal bonus true damage equal to 16% AD.

abilities.name: Phosphorus Bomb
abilities.description: Corki launches a bomb at the target location that explodes upon impact, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.

abilities.name: Valkyrie
abilities.description: Corki dashes to the target location and drops bombs that leave up to 3 blazing patches along his path, depending on the distance traveled.

abilities.name: Gatling Gun
abilities.description: Corki sprays bullets in a cone toward his facing direction for 4 seconds, dealing physical damage every 0.25 seconds to enemies hit.

abilities.name: Missile Barrage
abilities.description: Corki fires a missile in the target direction that explodes upon the first enemy hit, dealing physical damage to enemies in an area.

abilities.name: Moonsilver Blade
abilities.description: After casting an ability, Diana gains 30% - 100% (based on level) bonus attack speed for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Crescent Strike
abilities.description: Diana unleashes a bolt of energy that travels in a counter-clockwise arc before exploding at the target location, granting sight of the area for 0.5 seconds and dealing magic damage to enemies hit along the way and within the detonation.

abilities.name: Pale Cascade
abilities.description: Diana grants herself a shield for up to 5 seconds and creates three spheres that orbit her counterclockwise for the same duration, detonating upon contact with an enemy to deal magic damage to nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Lunar Rush
abilities.description: Diana dashes to a location near the target enemy, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies upon arrival and consuming their Moonlight.

abilities.name: Moonfall
abilities.description: Diana charges for up to 1 second, marking an area around herself that expands its radius over the duration.

abilities.name: Goes Where He Pleases
abilities.description: Periodically, Dr.

abilities.name: Infected Bonesaw
abilities.description: Dr.

abilities.name: Heart Zapper
abilities.description: Dr.

abilities.name: Blunt Force Trauma
abilities.description: Dr.

abilities.name: Maximum Dosage
abilities.description: Dr.

abilities.name: League of Draven
abilities.description: Whenever Draven catches a _Spinning Axe_, kills a non-champion, or destroys a turret, he generates a stack of _Adoration_.

abilities.name: Spinning Axe
abilities.description: Draven readies an axe, causing his next basic attack within 6 seconds to deal bonus physical damage.

abilities.name: Blood Rush
abilities.description: Draven gains bonus attack speed for 3 seconds as well as decaying bonus movement speed for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Stand Aside
abilities.description: Draven throws a fan of axes in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies hit, knocking them aside, though not through terrain, and slowing them for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Whirling Death
abilities.description: Draven hurls two massive axes in the target direction that deal physical damage to enemies hit.

abilities.name: Demon Shade
abilities.description: Evelynn shrouds herself in _Demon Shade_ after 4 seconds without breaking stealth.

abilities.name: Hate Spike
abilities.description: Evelynn barrages 2 lines of deadly spikes over 0.4 seconds in the target direction that each deal magic damage to enemies hit.

abilities.name: Allure
abilities.description: Evelynn marks the target enemy champion or medium or large monster for 5 seconds, causing her next basic attack or ability against them to consume the mark and slow by 65% for a set duration.

abilities.name: Whiplash
abilities.description: Evelynn whips the target enemy with her lashers, dealing magic damage and applying on-hit effects.

abilities.name: Last Caress
abilities.description: Evelynn reveals her true form, becoming untargetable at the start of the cast time and then unleashing her lashers in a cone in the target direction, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.

abilities.name: Rising Spell Force
abilities.description: Ezreal's ability hits generate a stack lasting 6 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits and stacking up to 4 times.

abilities.name: Mystic Shot
abilities.description: Ezreal shoots an energy bolt in the target direction that deals physical damage to the first enemy hit.

abilities.name: Essence Flux
abilities.description: Ezreal flings an orb in the target direction that marks the first enemy champion, epic monster, or turret hit for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Arcane Shift
abilities.description: Ezreal blinks to the target location, then shoots a bolt that deals magic damage to the nearest enemy and reveals them for 1 second.

abilities.name: Trueshot Barrage
abilities.description: Ezreal fires an arc of energy in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit, reduced to 50% against minions and non-epic monsters.

abilities.name: A Harmless Scarecrow
abilities.description: Innate Whenever a nearby enemy champion or epic monster dies, Fiddlesticks spawns a _Scarecrow Effigy_ from their corpse.

abilities.name: Terrify
abilities.description: Fiddlesticks throws a crow to the target enemy that deals magic damage, which has a minimum damage threshold and is capped at 400 against monsters.

abilities.name: Bountiful Harvest
abilities.description: Fiddlesticks forms a tether between itself and each nearby enemy over the cast time, then channels for up to 2 seconds to reveal them.

abilities.name: Reap
abilities.description: Fiddlesticks slashes the target location, dealing magic damage to enemies within and slowing them for 1.25 seconds.

abilities.name: Crowstorm
abilities.description: Fiddlesticks channels for 1.5 seconds and slowly moves forward.

abilities.name: Duelist's Dance
abilities.description: Fiora identifies the Vitals of nearby visible enemy champions, marked as an arc around them in North-, East-, South- or Westward direction.

abilities.name: Lunge
abilities.description: Fiora dashes in the target direction then stabs a nearby enemy, dealing physical damage and applying on-hit effects.

abilities.name: Riposte
abilities.description: Fiora enters a defensive stance for 0.75 seconds, becoming unable to act, preventing all incoming non- turret damage, and gaining debuff immunity and crowd control immunity.

abilities.name: Bladework
abilities.description: Fiora empowers her next two basic attacks on-attack within 4 seconds to gain 25 bonus range and 60% bonus attack speed.

abilities.name: Grand Challenge
abilities.description: Fiora challenges the target enemy champion for 8 seconds, highlighting all four of their Vitals.

abilities.name: Colossal Smash
abilities.description: Periodically, Galio's next basic attack is empowered gain 40% bonus attack speed, have an uncancellable windup, and deal 15 - 155 (based on level)(+ 100% AD)(+ 45% AP)(+ 60% bonus magic resistance)modified magic damage to the target and all

abilities.name: Winds of War
abilities.description: Galio creates two windblasts at either side of him that arc out before converging to the target location, dealing magic damage to all enemies they pass through.

abilities.name: Shield of Durand
abilities.description: Galio charges for up to 2 seconds, slowing himself by 15%, and gaining magic damage reduction and half of that amount as physical damage reduction; charging increases _Shield of Durand's_ radius and taunt duration over the first 1.25 second

abilities.name: Justice Punch
abilities.description: Galio steps backwards in the opposite direction over the cast time, then dashes in the target direction until he hits an enemy champion or terrain.

abilities.name: Hero's Entrance
abilities.description: Galio prepares to make an entrance, channeling for 2.75 seconds and designating the target allied champion's location at the time of cast as his landing spot.

abilities.name: Perseverance
abilities.description: Garenregenerates1.2% - 4% (based on level) missing health every second.

abilities.name: Decisive Strike
abilities.description: Garen cleanses from all slows and gains 35% bonus movement speed for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Courage
abilities.description: Garen gains 30% incoming damage reduction for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Judgment
abilities.description: Garen rapidly spins his sword around, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies every 0.375 / 0.341 / 0.307 / 0.273 (based on level) seconds over 3 seconds, and becoming unable to basic attack.

abilities.name: Demacian Justice
abilities.description: Garen calls upon the might of DEMACIA onto the target enemy champion, dealing true damage as well as revealing them for 1 second at the start of the cast time.

abilities.name: Happy Hour
abilities.description: Periodically, after casting an ability, Gragas heals himself for 8.5% of his maximum health.

abilities.name: Barrel Roll
abilities.description: Gragas rolls a cask to the target location, remaining there for 3 seconds and granting sight of the area.

abilities.name: Drunken Rage
abilities.description: Gragas channels for 0.75 seconds, drinking out of his brew, and gains damage reduction for 2.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Body Slam
abilities.description: Gragas charges in the target direction and stops upon colliding with an enemy, dealing magic damage to all nearby enemies, knocking them back, though not through terrain, and stunning them for 1 second.

abilities.name: Explosive Cask
abilities.description: Gragas hurls a cask that travels to the target location over 0.5 seconds, exploding on impact to deal magic damage to all enemies within the area and knock them back, though not through terrain, from the epicenter of the explosion, as well

abilities.name: New Destiny
abilities.description: Innate - Double Barrel: Graves' basic attacks consume ammunition within 2 rounds, he will briefly reload immediately after expending all rounds or withholding leftover rounds for a while. The reload time is reduced by Graves' level and bonu

abilities.name: End of the Line
abilities.description: Graves fires a shell in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies it passes through and leaves behind a powder trail.

abilities.name: Smoke Screen
abilities.description: Graves fires a canister at the target location that deals magic damage to enemies within the area and slows them by 50% for 0.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Quickdraw
abilities.description: Graves dashes to the target location, reloading 1 round and generating a stack of _True Grit_ for 4 seconds, stacking up to 6 times.

abilities.name: Collateral Damage
abilities.description: Graves fires an explosive shot in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies hit and makes him recoil 300 units backward.

abilities.name: A Thousand Cuts
abilities.description: Gwen's basic attacks on-hit, the center of _Snip Snip!_, and _Needlework_ all deal bonus magic damage equal to 1% (+ 0.5% per 100 AP) of the target's maximum health.

abilities.name: Snip Snip!
abilities.description: Gwen snips at least twice with her scissors in a cone in the target direction over the cast time, each time dealing magic damage to all enemies within the area, with the final snip dealing increased damage.

abilities.name: Hallowed Mist
abilities.description: Gwen summons the Hallowed Mist upon her current location, lasting for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Skip 'n Slash
abilities.description: Gwen dashes to the target location, then empowers her basic attacks within the next 4 seconds to deal 10 magic damage(+ 18% AP) on-hit and gain attack speed and 100 Range.

abilities.name: Needlework
abilities.description: First Cast: Gwen launches a needle in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and slows them for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Warpath
abilities.description: Hecarim gains bonus attack damage equal to 12% / 16% / 20% / 24% (based on level) of his bonus move speed.

abilities.name: Rampage
abilities.description: Hecarim charges his halberd for 0.75 seconds, after which he deals physical damage to nearby enemies, reduced to 60% against minions.

abilities.name: Spirit of Dread
abilities.description: Hecarim surrounds himself with the Spirit of Dread for 4 seconds, dealing magic damage every 0.5 seconds to nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Devastating Charge
abilities.description: Hecarim gains 25% - 55% (based on time active) bonus movement speed for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Onslaught of Shadows
abilities.description: Hecarim dashes with displacement immunity to the target location and summons 5 spectral riders in an arrow formation that charge alongside him in the target direction, dealing magic damage to all enemies in their path and revealing them for

abilities.name: Ionian Fervor
abilities.description: Irelia generates a stack of _Ionian Fervor_ for each enemy champion hit by her abilities, or if she hits at least one non-champion.

abilities.name: Bladesurge
abilities.description: Irelia dashes 100 units through the target enemy's location, and upon collision or arrival, she deals physical damage, applies on-hit effects, and heals herself.

abilities.name: Defiant Dance
abilities.description: Active - Hold: Irelia charges for up to 1.5 seconds, reducing incoming damage by 60% (+ 7% per 100 AP). The charge cannot be interrupted.

abilities.name: Flawless Duet
abilities.description: Irelia sends a blade to the target location for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Vanguard's Edge
abilities.description: Irelia launches a barrage of blades in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and revealing them for 1 second.

abilities.name: Tailwind
abilities.description: Janna gains 5% bonus movement speed and grants the same amount to nearby allied champions.

abilities.name: Howling Gale
abilities.description: Janna summons a whirlwind at her current location that charges up over 0.75 seconds, then flies in the target direction over 0.5 seconds, dealing magic damage and knocking up enemies hit for 0.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Zephyr
abilities.description: Janna gains bonus movement speed and sends air elementals to the 3 nearest champions.

abilities.name: Eye of the Storm
abilities.description: Janna shields herself, the nearest turret, and the most wounded nearest allied champion for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Monsoon
abilities.description: Janna unleashes a blast that knocks back nearby enemies to up to 875 units over 0.5 seconds, though not through terrain.

abilities.name: Martial Cadence
abilities.description: Jarvan IV's basic attacks are empowered to deal bonus physical damage equal to 8% of the target's current health.

abilities.name: Dragon Strike
abilities.description: Jarvan IV extends his lance in the target direction, dealing physical damage to enemies hit and inflicting them with armor reduction for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Golden Aegis
abilities.description: Jarvan IV slows all nearby enemies for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Demacian Standard
abilities.description: Jarvan IV throws a Demacian flag to the target location, dealing magic damage to enemies within the area.

abilities.name: Cataclysm
abilities.description: Jarvan IV leaps with displacement immunity to the target enemy champion's location over 0.35 seconds, dealing physical damage to all nearby enemies upon arrival.

abilities.name: Relentless Assault
abilities.description: Jax's basic attacks on-attack against non-monsters generate a stack for 3 seconds, refreshing on subsequent attacks and stacking up to 5 times.

abilities.name: Leap Strike
abilities.description: Jax dashes to the location of the target unit or ward.

abilities.name: Empower
abilities.description: Jax empowers his next basic attack or _Leap Strike_ against an enemy within 10 seconds to deal bonus magic damage.

abilities.name: Counter Strike
abilities.description: Jax enters _Evasion_ for 2 seconds: a defensive stance where he dodges all incoming non- turret basic attacks and abilities that apply on-hit effects, and also takes 25% reduced damage from champions.

abilities.name: Grandmaster-at-Arms
abilities.description: Jax swings his lantern, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Whisper
abilities.description: Jhin's basic attacks consume ammunition, up to 4 rounds, and fires at a fixed rate.

abilities.name: Dancing Grenade
abilities.description: Jhin throws a grenade at the target enemy that deals physical damage and can bounce to up to three additional nearby enemies, prioritizing the closest enemy that has not been hit.

abilities.name: Deadly Flourish
abilities.description: Jhin fires a shot in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies hit, reduced to 75% against minions and monsters, and stops upon hitting an enemy champion.

abilities.name: Captive Audience
abilities.description: Jhin places a _Lotus Trap_ at the target location which, upon landing, becomes stealthed after arming over 1 second, lasting for up to 90 seconds and granting sight within its radius.

abilities.name: Curtain Call
abilities.description: Jhin channels for up to 10 seconds, transforming his weapon into a cannon and gaining the ability to recast _Curtain Call_ 4 times within the duration.

abilities.name: Get Excited!
abilities.description: Whenever Jinx scores a takedown against an enemy champion, epic monster, or turret within 3 seconds of damaging them, she restores 10% missing mana and gains 140% bonus movement speed decaying over 6 seconds.

abilities.name: Switcheroo!
abilities.description: Jinx can switch between using her minigun _Pow-Pow_ and her rocket launcher _Fishbones_.

abilities.name: Zap!
abilities.description: Jinx fires a bolt in the target direction that deals physical damage to the first enemy hit, revealing and slowing them for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Flame Chompers!
abilities.description: Jinx tosses out 3 traps centered at the target location that arm after 0.75 seconds, then explode after 5 seconds to deal magic damage to nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Super Mega Death Rocket!
abilities.description: Jinx fires a massive rocket in the target direction, briefly granting sight of its surroundings and exploding upon the first enemy champion hit.

abilities.name: Second Skin
abilities.description: Innate - Living Weapon: Kai'Sa can evolve each of her basic abilities by obtaining an upgraded item. Evolving an ability causes her to enter a 2-second cast time. The upgrade is lost if the item is sold.

abilities.name: Icathian Rain
abilities.description: Kai'Sa shoots a swarm of 6 missiles that evenly distributes among nearby visible enemies, each one hitting their target after 0.4 seconds to deal physical damage.

abilities.name: Void Seeker
abilities.description: Kai'Sa shoots a void bolt in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first enemy hit, inflicts 2 Plasma, and reveals them for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Supercharge
abilities.description: Kai'Sa charges up over the cast time, during which she is still allowed to move and gains bonus movement speed, increased by 0% - 80% (based on bonus attack speed).

abilities.name: Killer Instinct
abilities.description: Kai'Sa shields herself for 2 seconds and dashes to a target location near a visible enemy champion that was affected by Plasma within the last 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Martial Poise
abilities.description: Whenever Kalista inputs a movement command during her basic attack windup or the cast time of _Pierce_, she will dash a short distance in the direction of the inputted location.

abilities.name: Pierce
abilities.description: Kalista launches a spear in the target direction that deals physical damage to the first enemy hit.

abilities.name: Sentinel
abilities.description: Kalista summons a _Sentinel_ that patrols back and forth on a path along the target direction, granting sight of its surroundings as it travels.

abilities.name: Rend
abilities.description: Kalista rips all lodged spears from nearby enemies, consuming all of their stacks to deal them physical damage and slow them for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Fate's Call
abilities.description: Kalista invokes her tether to retrieve and hold her _Oathsworn_ for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Mantra
abilities.description: Ability casts generate a stack.

abilities.name: Inner Flame
abilities.description: Karma shoots a bolt in the target direction that explodes upon the first enemy hit, dealing magic damage to enemies hit and slowing them by 35% for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Focused Resolve
abilities.description: Karma deals magic damage to the two nearest enemy champions and forms a tether to them for 1.75 seconds, during which they are revealed.

abilities.name: Inspire
abilities.description: Karma shields herself or the target allied champion for 3 seconds as well as granting 30% bonus movement speed for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Transcendent Embrace
abilities.description: Karma forms a ring of spirit energy at the target location that detonates after 1 second, dealing magic damage to enemies hit and slowing them by 35% for 1 second.

abilities.name: Void Stone
abilities.description: Periodically after casting an ability, Kassadin gains a shield lasting 1.5 seconds for 50 - 190 (based on level)(+ 30% AP).

abilities.name: Null Sphere
abilities.description: Kassadin fires an orb of void energy in the target direction that deals magic damage and silences the first enemy hit for 1 second.

abilities.name: Nether Blade
abilities.description: Kassadin empowers his next basic attack within 4 seconds to have an uncancellable windup, gain 250 bonus range, deal bonus magic damage, and restore (5% / 15%) missing mana.

abilities.name: Force Pulse
abilities.description: Kassadin emits a pulse of void energy in a cone in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and slows them by 30% for 1 second.

abilities.name: Riftwalk
abilities.description: Kassadin blinks to the target location, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies upon arrival.

abilities.name: Voracity
abilities.description: Scoring a champion takedown within 3 seconds of damaging them will reduce the current cooldowns of Katarina's abilities by 15 seconds.

abilities.name: Bouncing Blade
abilities.description: Katarina throws a Dagger at the target enemy that deals magic damage and can bounce to up to two additional nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Preparation
abilities.description: Katarina tosses a Dagger into the air above her current location and gains bonus movement speed until it lands after 1.25 seconds.

abilities.name: Shunpo
abilities.description: Katarina blinks to a target location near the unit or Dagger, dealing magic damage to the nearest enemy in range.

abilities.name: Death Lotus
abilities.description: Katarina channels for up to 2.6 seconds, rapidly throwing a dagger every 0.13 seconds to up to 3 of the closest nearby enemy champions, revealing herself in the process.

abilities.name: Divine Ascent
abilities.description: Kayle ascends through four forms that each grant additional bonuses.

abilities.name: Radiant Blast
abilities.description: Kayle conjures a portal in front of her that faces the target direction, from which a celestial sword launches forward.

abilities.name: Celestial Blessing
abilities.description: Kayle and the target allied champion are healed and gain bonus movement speed for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Starfire Spellblade
abilities.description: Kayle empowers her next basic attack within 6 seconds to have an uncancellable windup and deal additional bonus magic damage on-hit.

abilities.name: Divine Judgment
abilities.description: Kayle grants herself or the target allied champion invulnerability for 2.5 seconds and conjures swords of fire.

abilities.name: The Darkin Scythe
abilities.description: Kayn has a secondary experience bar that progresses toward unlocking his Darkin and Shadow forms.

abilities.name: Reaping Slash
abilities.description: Kayn dashes in the target direction, dealing physical damage to enemies he passes through.

abilities.name: Blade's Reach
abilities.description: Kayn sweeps up in the target direction, dealing physical damage to enemies hit and slowing them by 90% decaying over 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Shadow Step
abilities.description: Kayn gains 35% bonus total movement speed and the ability to ignore terrain collision for a duration.

abilities.name: Umbral Trespass
abilities.description: Kayn vanishes and dashes to a _marked_ enemy champion.

abilities.name: Mark of the Storm
abilities.description: Kennen's abilities apply a stack of _Mark of the Storm_ to enemies hit for 6 seconds, refreshing on subsequent applications and stacking up to 3 times.

abilities.name: Thundering Shuriken
abilities.description: Kennen throws a shuriken in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first enemy hit.

abilities.name: Electrical Surge
abilities.description: Kennen sends out a surge of electricity that deals magic damage to all nearby enemies afflicted by _Mark of the Storm_.

abilities.name: Lightning Rush
abilities.description: Kennen turns into lightning for 2 seconds, becoming unable to declare basic attacks but gaining 100% bonus movement speed, doubled to 200% during the first 0.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Slicing Maelstrom
abilities.description: Kennen summons a storm around himself for 3 seconds, gaining bonus armor and bonus magic resistance for the duration.

abilities.name: Mark of the Kindred
abilities.description: Both Lamb and Wolf mark targets to _hunt_.

abilities.name: Dance of Arrows
abilities.description: Lamb dashes in the target direction, gaining 25%(+ 5% per Mark) bonus attack speed for 4 seconds and shooting an arrow at up to 3 nearby visible enemies that deals physical damage.

abilities.name: Wolf's Frenzy
abilities.description: Wolf dashes to the target location, separating from Lamb to remain there for the next 8.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Mounting Dread
abilities.description: Lamb fires a shot at the target enemy that slows them by 50% (+ 5% per 100 AP) for 1 second and marks them for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Lamb's Respite
abilities.description: Lamb enters a 0.25-second cast time, creating a sacred zone underneath that lasts 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Sunlight
abilities.description: Leona's abilities inflict a mark to enemies hit for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Shield of Daybreak
abilities.description: Leona empowers her next basic attack within 6 seconds to have a 0.25-second cast time, gain 50 bonus range, deal bonus magic damage and stun the target for 1 second.

abilities.name: Eclipse
abilities.description: Leona gains bonus armor and magic resistance for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Zenith Blade
abilities.description: Leona projects her sword in the target direction, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.

abilities.name: Solar Flare
abilities.description: Leona casts down a solar flare upon the target location after 0.625 seconds, dealing magic damage and slowing enemies hit by 80% for 1.75 seconds.

abilities.name: Dream-Laden Bough
abilities.description: Lillia's abilities apply _Dream Dust_ to enemies hit, which deals 6% (+ 1.25% per 100 AP) of the target's maximum healthtotal magic damage over 3 seconds, capped at 60 - 144 (based on level) against monsters.

abilities.name: Blooming Blows
abilities.description: Lillia swings her censer around her, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Watch Out! Eep!
abilities.description: Lillia dashes to the target location over 0.75, though not through terrain, and deals magic damage in an area around the target spot.

abilities.name: Swirlseed
abilities.description: Lillia lobs a seed at the target location that rolls forward indefinitely.

abilities.name: Lilting Lullaby
abilities.description: Lillia casts a magical lullaby over all enemy champions affected by _Dream Dust_, which renders them #Drowsy "An icon representing the keyword Wr drowsy") drowsy for 1.5.

abilities.name: Iceborn Subjugation
abilities.description: Whenever a nearby enemy champion dies, Lissandra spawns a _Frozen Thrall_ from their corpse.

abilities.name: Ice Shard
abilities.description: Lissandra launches a shard of ice in the target direction that deals magic damage and slows enemies hit for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Ring of Frost
abilities.description: Lissandra freezes nearby enemies, dealing magic damage and rooting them for a duration.

abilities.name: Glacial Path
abilities.description: Lissandra sends a claw of ice in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies it passes through, decelerating over 1.25 seconds.

abilities.name: Frozen Tomb
abilities.description: Lissandra summons dark ice on an enemy champion or herself.

abilities.name: Lightslinger
abilities.description: After casting an ability, Lucian's next basic attack within 3.5 seconds fires an additional shot on-attack after 0.25 seconds, dealing physical damage equal to ((35% / 50% / 65% (based on level)) / 100%) AD.

abilities.name: Piercing Light
abilities.description: Lucian fires a laser in a line in the direction of the target enemy that deals physical damage to enemies hit.

abilities.name: Ardent Blaze
abilities.description: Lucian fires a missile in the target direction that explodes in a cross pattern upon hitting an enemy or maximum range, dealing magic damage to enemies hit and granting sight of the area for 1 second.

abilities.name: Relentless Pursuit
abilities.description: Lucian dashes in the target direction.

abilities.name: The Culling
abilities.description: Lucian channels for up to 3 seconds, rapidly firing a number of shots in the target direction.

abilities.name: Pix, Faerie Companion
abilities.description: Lulu is assisted by _Pix_, an untargetable faerie who follows her around and fires a barrage of 3 bolts towards her target whenever she uses a basic attack on-attack.

abilities.name: Glitterlance
abilities.description: Lulu and _Pix_ both fire a magic bolt towards the target location, each dealing magic damage to enemies hit and slowing them by 80% decaying over 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Whimsy
abilities.description: _Pix_ moves to plant a faerie ring at the target location that lingers for 5 seconds, enchanting the first champion that enters (prioritizing enemies).

abilities.name: Help, Pix!
abilities.description: Lulu can cast _Help, Pix!_ on the target champion.

abilities.name: Wild Growth
abilities.description: Lulu enlarges herself or the target allied champion, knocking up nearby enemies for 0.75 seconds.

abilities.name: Illumination
abilities.description: Lux's abilities inflict a mark to enemies hit for 6 seconds.

abilities.name: Light Binding
abilities.description: Lux shoots a ball of light in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit.

abilities.name: Prismatic Barrier
abilities.description: Lux throws her wand in the target direction, granting allied champions hit a shield lasting 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Lucent Singularity
abilities.description: Lux sends a lucent singularity to the target location that remains for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Final Spark
abilities.description: Lux fires a massive laser in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and reveals them for 1.5 seconds, as well as granting sight of the surrounding area.

abilities.name: Granite Shield
abilities.description: Malphite gains a shield equal to 11% maximum health that lasts until broken.

abilities.name: Seismic Shard
abilities.description: Malphite sends a shard to the target enemy that deals magic damage and slows them for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Thunderclap
abilities.description: Malphite's basic attacks on-hit are empowered for 5 seconds, causing him to emit a cone that deals physical damage to enemies hit.

abilities.name: Ground Slam
abilities.description: Malphite slams the ground beneath him, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies and crippling them for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Unstoppable Force
abilities.description: Malphite dashes with displacement immunity to the target location.

abilities.name: Sap Magic
abilities.description: Periodically, Maokai's next basic attack will have an uncancellable windup and heal him for 4% - 10% (based on level) maximum health.

abilities.name: Bramble Smash
abilities.description: Maokai sends a shockwave in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and slows them by 99% for 0.25 seconds.

abilities.name: Twisted Advance
abilities.description: Maokai dashes to the target enemy while being untargetable.

abilities.name: Sapling Toss
abilities.description: Maokai flings a _Sapling_ to the target location, which grants sight of the area as it lingers for 20 seconds.

abilities.name: Nature's Grasp
abilities.description: Maokai summons a colossal wave of five thorny brambles that slowly advances in the target direction.

abilities.name: Double Strike
abilities.description: Master Yi's basic attacks on-hit generate a stack of _Double Strike_ for 4 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits and stacking up to 3 times.

abilities.name: Alpha Strike
abilities.description: Master Yi vanishes and becomes unable to act.

abilities.name: Meditate
abilities.description: Master Yi channels for up to 4 seconds, healing himself every 0.5 seconds, increased by 0% - 100% (based on missing health).

abilities.name: Wuju Style
abilities.description: Master Yi empowers his basic attacks within the next 5 seconds to deal bonus true damage on-hit.

abilities.name: Highlander
abilities.description: Master Yi cleanses himself from all slows and cripples.

abilities.name: Searing Brilliance
abilities.description: Mel's basic attacks and abilities apply a stack of _Overwhelm_ for each instance of damage they deal to enemies for 5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent times and stacking infinitely.

abilities.name: Radiant Volley
abilities.description: Mel concentrates a bombardment of luminous bolts at the target location over 0.5 seconds, each dealing magic damage to nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Rebuttal
abilities.description: Mel forms a protective barrier around herself for 0.75 seconds, becoming invulnerable to non- turret damage and and gaining 40% bonus movement speed decaying over 1 second.

abilities.name: Solar Snare
abilities.description: Mel fires an orb in the target direction that grants sight of its surroundings every 0.25 seconds as it travels.

abilities.name: Golden Eclipse
abilities.description: Mel unleashes a radiant blast on all enemies affected by _Overwhelm_, dealing magic damage to each of them.

abilities.name: Fired Up!
abilities.description: Milio's ability hits on himself and allied champions grant an enchantment for 4 seconds, which causes their next basic attack or ability hit against enemies to deal 10% of enchanted target's ADbonus magic damage and burn them for「 15 - 43 (

abilities.name: Ultra Mega Fire Kick
abilities.description: Milio kicks a fireball in the target direction that knocks back and stuns the first enemy hit for 1 second.

abilities.name: Cozy Campfire
abilities.description: Milio ignites a soothing fire for himself or the target allied champion for 6 seconds.

abilities.name: Warm Hugs
abilities.description: Milio wraps himself or the target allied champion in protective flames, granting shield and bonus movement speed for 2.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Breath of Life
abilities.description: Milio explodes in soothing flames, healing and cleansing himself and nearby allied champions of non- airborne crowd control, and granting them 65% tenacity for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Love Tap
abilities.description: Miss Fortune's basic attacks and abilities against enemy champions and epic monsters inflict a stack of _Love Tap_ for 5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits and stacking up to 3 times.

abilities.name: Double Up
abilities.description: Miss Fortune fires a shot in the target direction that deals physical damage to the first enemy hit, then bounces behind them to hit another enemy and critically strike for (20% + 6%) bonus physical damage.

abilities.name: Strut
abilities.description: Miss Fortune gains bonus attack speed for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Make It Rain
abilities.description: Miss Fortune casts a hail of bullets at the target location for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Bullet Time
abilities.description: Miss Fortune channels for up to 3 seconds, firing a number of waves of bullets in the target direction.

abilities.name: Darkness Rise
abilities.description: Mordekaiser gains 1% / 3% / 5% / 7% (based on level) magic penetration and deals 30% AP bonus magic damage on-hit.

abilities.name: Obliterate
abilities.description: Mordekaiser strikes upon an area in the target direction, dealing magic damage to enemies hit, increased if only one enemy is hit.

abilities.name: Indestructible
abilities.description: Mordekaiser consumes his _Potential Shield_ to gain an equal amount as a shield lasting 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Death's Grasp
abilities.description: Mordekaiser summons a claw in the target direction that grants sight of the area.

abilities.name: Realm of Death
abilities.description: Mordekaiser aims his mace towards the target enemy champion, slowing them by 75% and revealing them over the cast time, and then banishing them with him to the _Death Realm_ for 7 seconds.

abilities.name: Soul Siphon
abilities.description: Morganaheals herself for 20% of the post-mitigation damage dealt by her abilities against champions, large minions, and medium and large monsters.

abilities.name: Dark Binding
abilities.description: Morgana throws an energy bolt in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first enemy hit and roots them for a duration.

abilities.name: Tormented Shadow
abilities.description: Morgana desecrates the target location for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Black Shield
abilities.description: Morgana grants a shield to the target allied champion or herself for 5 seconds, which absorbs incoming magic damage and grants crowd control immunity while it holds.

abilities.name: Soul Shackles
abilities.description: Morgana shackles to nearby enemy champions over the cast time, dealing magic damage and tethering to each of them for 3 seconds, during which she gains bonus movement speed while the targets are revealed and slowed by 15%.

abilities.name: Pyromania
abilities.description: Innate - Pyromania: Annie generates a stack of _Pyromania_ whenever she casts an ability, stacking up to 4 times, at which she gains _Energized_.

abilities.name: Disintegrate
abilities.description: Annie hurls a fireball in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first enemy hit and all nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Incinerate
abilities.description: Annie releases fire in a cone in the target direction, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.

abilities.name: Molten Shield
abilities.description: Annie grants herself and Tibbers a shield for 3 seconds and bonus movement speed that decays over 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Summon: Tibbers
abilities.description: Annie summons Tibbers to the target location in a burst of flame, dealing magic damage to enemies near him.
